accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Baltic capital peaks Jun–Aug.

evidence.quote: Digital nomads can plan for approximately $1,565/month in Tallinn, covering coworking, accommodation, food, and local transport
Monthly rent costs average $615 per month. The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £604

evidence.claim: public transport FREE for registered residents; groceries €300–€400; utilities €100–€150
evidence.quote: €0 transport (Tallinn public transport is FREE for residents). €300-400 groceries. €100-150 utilities

evidence.claim: Tallinn 66% cheaper than NYC; e-residency hub for EU access
evidence.quote: Tallinn is 66% cheaper than New York City, making it an attractive destination for digital nomads
